name: Viatra Reeves | Heavy Weapons Operator
description:
"Hope you got your noise reduction set to max, kid. Shit is about to get loud.”

Images are linked below, check them out!

Viatra is a heavy weapons operator and commander of the Area Denial and Extraction Team, infamous for their near-perfect extraction rates. While they're officially abbreviated to ADET, the team has earned many nicknames from those whom they've saved and from those who've faced them. "Fire Angels", "God's Wind", "Sky's Executioner", all brought forth from people's stories. ADET has an incredible track record of only one failed extraction out of over two hundred, which is an unmatched record for any other extraction forces of the past.

Viatra holds the role of immediate area denial, working as the heavy and generally conducting the head of the death train once the ship touches down. She sports a mean minigun that she handles like an artist, with the floors and walls being the canvas for her brush to paint with blood. Her attitude is fierce, confident, demanding, and driven to her work. Her love for her team is that of a family, knowing the inner workings of each individual to a tea, as they know her the same. She works with pride, knowing that out in the battlefield, it’s your life or theirs.

Equipment and Team:

Image Heavy
Viatra | "Heavy"
Her TX-282 frontal-force armor is specifically designs to tank incoming rounds and be able to keep moving. It's heavy, thick, but damn is it strong. The built-in exosuit makes traversing for Viatra easy and powerful, all while maintaining it's workable frame. Her backpack houses the ADET-issued scanner/targeting pod. It's capable of scanning terrain, finding heat signatures, tracking and highlighting targets on the host's HUD, and even act as an early-warning system against larger threats.

Image Engi
Windall |
